data.title: Taylor Morrison rebrands to "Homes Built for Real Life," focusing on everyday moments. NYSE: TMHC. (94 chars)
data.description: Taylor Morrison, a leading home builder in America, recently launched a new brand platform called Homes Built for Real Life, which aims to celebrate the everyday moments in a home. The platform was introduced on February 18, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona. Taylor Morrison, listed as NYSE: TMHC, is recognized as America's Most Trusted Home Builder. Their initiative emphasizes the importance of embracing the imperfections and realities of daily life at home. This endeavor signifies a shift towards promoting authenticity and practicality in home living experiences.

data.title: Wayfinder's Camp Bloomfield staff address parents' concerns for blind/visually impaired youth/teen session (ages 7-17).
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 18, 2026, the staff at Wayfinder's Camp Bloomfield have revealed the most frequently asked questions and worries from parents as the registration cutoff for this summer nears. The camp's youth/teen program is tailored for kids between 7 and 17 years old who are either blind or have visual impairments.

data.title: Hyperproof introduces Hierarchical Scopes to aid enterprises in expanding compliance; streamlining operations without extra manual effort.
data.description: Today, in Bellevue, Wash., Hyperproof, the leading GRC platform, introduced Hierarchical Scopes as part of its latest update on Feb. 18, 2026. This new feature brings a multi-level structure, offering clearer ownership and roll-up visibility. Hyperproof's Scopes enhancement aims to streamline processes without requiring extra manual work.

data.title: David Greenberg, former NYMEX board member, joins Andromeda Ventures as Senior Advisor. Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: Renowned philanthropist and former NYMEX Board Member, David Greenberg, disclosed joining Andromeda Ventures on February 18, 2026, as a Senior Advisor. In this new role, Greenberg will leverage his expertise and insights to support the firm in its mission to further its objectives. Andromeda Ventures is set to benefit significantly from Greenberg's vast experience, enhancing its strategic initiatives and fostering growth.

data.title: Hycroft Mining sees a 55% growth in mineral resources, with 16.4M gold ounces, 562.6M silver ounces, and 90.2M silver ounces in high-grade resources. Metallurgy shows recoveries of 83% gold and 78% silver.
data.description: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation, a company listed on Nasdaq, recently announced significant resource estimates. They reported initial mineral resources totaling 16.4 million ounces of gold and 562.6 million ounces of silver in the measured and indicated category. Additionally, they identified a high-grade silver resource of 90.2 million ounces in the same category. Metallurgical tests have shown strong recoveries, with 83% for gold and 78% for silver. The announcement was made on February 18, 2026, in Winnemucca, Nevada.

data.title: Hyperscale Data to acquire 100,000 ounces of silver in strategic reserve program. $GPUS #AI #Bitcoin
data.description: Las Vegas, 18th February 2026 - A company known as Hyperscale Data, Inc. (traded as GPUS on NYSE American), specializing in artificial intelligence data centers powered by Bitcoin, disclosed plans for a strategic silver reserve initiative. This venture is anticipated to involve a substantial investment, with specific details yet to be revealed.

data.title: WiseStamp launches new free email signature generator for desktop and mobile to enhance user experience.
data.description: WiseStamp has recently enhanced its free email signature generator experience for both desktop and mobile platforms. The announcement was made on February 18, 2026, in New York. WiseStamp is a notable email signature management platform and has launched the updated generator to cater to professionals and individuals looking to improve their email signatures. This new tool is available for free and aims to offer an improved experience for users across different devices.

data.title: Lowe's to host Q4 & Fiscal 2025 earnings conference call on Feb. 25 at 9 a.m. Eastern time. Visit webcast for details.
data.description: In Mooresville, North Carolina, on February 18, 2026, Lowe's Companies, Inc. (NYSE: LOW) revealed plans for its Fourth Quarter & Fiscal 2025 Earnings Conference Call scheduled for 9 a.m. Eastern time on Wednesday, February 25. Those interested can access a webcast for the call by visiting the Quarterly Earnings section, offering an opportunity to delve into the company's financial state.

data.title: Circuit secures $30M funding for AI in manufacturing, tackling skills gap. Austin-based company scaling expertise.
data.description: An Austin-based company, Circuit, specializing in developing an AI platform for manufacturing and service organizations, recently secured a substantial $30 million in funding. The investment, considered one of Texas' largest angel rounds, aims to support the company in scaling its expertise, especially as the skills gap in the manufacturing sector continues to widen. This funding reinforces Circuit's position in the industry and underscores the potential for innovation and growth within the manufacturing and service sectors.

data.title: HF Sinclair (NYSE: DINO) Q4 earnings report: EPS beats estimates by 166.67% at $1.2, revenue down $36M YoY.
data.description: HF Sinclair (NYSE: DINO) recently announced its Q4 earnings on February 18, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The company exceeded expectations with an EPS of $1.2, surpassing the estimated $0.45 by 166.67%. However, revenue declined by $36.00 million compared to the previous year. This marks a significant improvement in earnings performance. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Enpro (NYSE: NPO) released its financial outcomes for the Fourth Quarter and Full-Year of 2025, along with the introduction of the 2026 Guidance.

data.title: Costamare Inc. reported Q4 2025 Net Income $72.6M ($0.60/share), with FY 2025 Adjusted Net Income of $375.6M ($3.12/share), and FY 2025 liquidity at $589.6M. Company entered 12 new fixtures on a forward basis with incremental contracted revenues of $940M, fixed 96% of the containership fleet for 2026 and 92% for 2027, totaling $3.4B in contracted revenues. Dividend declared at $0.115 per share on common stock and varying amounts on Preferred Stock. Controlling interest in Neptune Maritime Leasing with investments exceeding $665M.
data.description: Costamare Inc. reported unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2025. The financial results reflect the spin-off of Costamare's dry bulk business into a standalone public company completed on May 6, 2025. For the year ended December 31, 2025, Adjusted Net Income from Continuing operations available to common stockholders was $375.6 million, with Liquidity at $589.6 million as of Q4 2025. They entered into 12 new fixtures with incremental contracted revenues of $940 million. The containership fleet was 96% fixed for 2026 and 92% for 2027. New debt financing agreements were made, and a controlling interest in Neptune Maritime Leasing Limited was increased to $247.8 million. Dividends were announced as well. Adjusted Net Income available to common stockholders from Continuing operations was $71.8 million in Q4 2025. The weighted average number of shares for Adjusted Net Income was 120,198,853. Adjusted Earnings per share from Continuing operations was $0.60 in Q4 2025. Non-GAAP financial measures were used for evaluation and are presented in addition to GAAP measures. Data reconciliations were provided for better understanding. Overall, Costamare exhibited strong financial performance and strategic growth in its operations.

data.title: HF Sinclair Corp's CEO voluntarily takes leave on Feb 17, 2026; Board accepts request and appoints Mr. Franklin My as Chairperson.
data.description: HF Sinclair Corporation (traded as DINO on NYSE and NYSE Texas) disclosed that CEO Mr. Tim Go and Board member requested a voluntary leave of absence on February 17, 2026. The board approved his request in a special meeting. Mr. Franklin My was appointed as the new Chairperson of the Board following this development.

data.title: Fiverr stock hits 52-week low after mixed results and weak 2026 outlook, with quarterly sales at $107.17 million.
data.description: Fiverr International Ltd. (NYSE: FVRR) reported a new 52-week low in premarket trading after delivering mixed fourth-quarter results and weaker-than-expected 2026 outlook. Despite beating earnings estimates with 86 cents per share, revenue growth slowed to 3.4% YoY at $107.17 million, missing the estimate of $109.05 million. Marketplace revenue declined to $71.5 million from $73.5 million. Active buyers dropped by 13.6% to 3.1 million, but annual spend per buyer increased by 13.3% to $342. The company's stock fell over 13% with a marketplace take rate at 27.7%.

data.title: HF Sinclair Corp reported Q4 net loss of $28M in 2025, compared to $214M in 2024. Announced regular cash dividend.
data.description: In Dallas, HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE and NYSE Texas, Inc.: DINO) announced a fourth quarter Net loss attributable to HF Sinclair stockholders of $28 million, or $(0.16) per diluted share, for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. This marks a significant improvement compared to the same period in 2024 when the Net loss attributable to HF Sinclair stockholders was $214 million, or $(1.14) per diluted share. The company's earnings release highlights adjustments made that impacted these financial results.

data.title: Travel+Leisure (NYSE: TNL) Q4 earnings beat estimates with EPS of $1.83, revenue up $55M from last year. Company exceeded previous quarter's earnings.
data.description: This Wednesday, February 18, 2026, Travel+Leisure (NYSE: TNL) disclosed its Q4 earnings. Surpassing expectations, the company reported an EPS of $1.83, exceeding the estimated $1.82 by 0.55%. Revenue saw a significant increase of $55.00 million compared to the previous year. Notably, in the last quarter, Travel+Leisure had also exceeded its earnings projections. More details can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cinemark Holdings (NYSE: CNK) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -42.86%, EPS $0.16 vs. $0.28. Revenue down $38 million.
data.description: Cinemark Holdings (NYSE: CNK) released its Q4 earnings on February 18, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The results showed a significant miss in estimated earnings, falling short by -42.86% with an EPS of $0.16 compared to the expected $0.28. Revenue also experienced a decline, dropping by $38.00 million compared to the previous year. For more details on the past earnings performance and a comprehensive overview of the announcement, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.
